tests.name: riscv_sha_source_consistency
tests.output: rg confirmed the new OPENSSL_riscvcap SHA examples and existing RISC-V SHA-2 dispatch symbols sha256_block_data_order_zbb, sha256_block_data_order_zvkb_zvknha_or_zvknhb, sha512_block_data_order_zvkb_zvknhb, and RISCV_HAS_ZVKB_AND_ZVKNHB.

summary: Local documentation checks passed, but Agent1 regression could not run because the agent1 command is not available in this environment.
